samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: In a large bowl, beat oil and sugar until fluffy
Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
Bake at 350 for 22 to 25 minutes or until done
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- oil
- sugar
- eggs
- pumpkin
- vanilla
- flour
- soda
- salt
- cinnamon
- cloves
- allspice
- ginger
- nutmeg
- pecans

Instructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat oil and sugar until fluffy
2. Add eggs, pumpkin and vanilla
3. Sift together dry ingredients
4. Blend into pumpkin mixture
5. Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
6. Bake at 350 for 22 to 25 minutes or until done
7. Cool completely in pan
8. Frost

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Grease and flour 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan
Add eggs, one at a time
Sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon and salt
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- oil
- sugar
- eggs
- zucchini
- carrots
- vanilla
- flour
- baking powder
- cinnamon
- salt
- nuts

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Grease and flour 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan
3. Beat sugar and oil
4. Add eggs, one at a time
5. Add zucchini, carrots and vanilla
6. Sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon and salt
7. Add to creamed mixture
8. Mix well
9. Add nuts
10. Stir

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- soda
- salt
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- butter
- egg
- buttermilk

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg
3. Add butter, egg and buttermilk
4. Stir just until moistened
5. Spoon into greased muffin cups
6. Bake 20 to 25 minutes

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Drop by teaspoons into hot fat
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar Cheddar cheese
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- milk
- egg

Instructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together
2. Cut in butter
3. Add milk, all at once
4. Stir until moist
5. Fold in egg
6. Drop by teaspoons into hot fat
7. Fry until brown
8. Makes 3 to 4 dozen
